name: Spectro
short_description: The original VR-ONLY ghost-busting, roguelike. Trap ghosts, dodge spells, loot chests, find hidden items, and explore an infinitely shifting haunted tower.
detailed_description:
The original VR-ONLY ghost-busting, roguelike.

Tested on: Vive, Rift, and Quest 2 (Link). Not tested/unsupported on newer headsets.

Something paranormal is sweeping through the town of Weirdwood. Dust off your gear and climb an ever-changing haunted tower. Capture phantoms, search for hidden totems, and discover powerful items.

Designed from the ground up for hand presence, room-scale dodging, and VR comfort.
